metadata.description: Automotive AI skills for Claude Code — diagnostics, maintenance, repair, EVs, motorcycles, and more.

plugins.name: automotive-ai-skills
plugins.description: All 16 automotive skills in one plugin: OBD-II diagnostics, repair, maintenance planning, used-car inspection, troubleshooting, customization, EV, motorcycle, diesel, classic car, fleet, tire & wheel, commercial vehicle, body & paint, towing, and car audio.
